titulo: Irán lanza misiles de gran alcance contra centros de mando de Israel
resumen: Teherán. El ejército iraní informó en un comunicado ayer que lanzó drones contra centros de seguridad israelíes, incluida la unidad policial Lahav 433 y un centro de comunicaciones por satélite, así como misiles de gran alcance contra infraestructuras militares y de mando.
texto_completo: Irán lanza misiles de gran alcance contra centros de mando de Israel. Teherán. El ejército iraní informó en un comunicado ayer que lanzó drones contra centros de seguridad israelíes, incluida la unidad policial Lahav 433 y un centro de comunicaciones por satélite, así como misiles de gran alcance contra infraestructuras militares y de mando.

titulo: Hallan contrato por 5 mdd para que Milei apoyara criptomoneda $LIBRA
resumen: Madrid. La investigación del caso de la $LIBRA en Argentina ha descubierto un documento de contrato por el que se establece un pago de 5 millones de dólares a cambio del apoyo público del presidente argentino, Javier Milei, a dicha criptomoneda.
texto_completo: Hallan contrato por 5 mdd para que Milei apoyara criptomoneda $LIBRA. Madrid. La investigación del caso de la $LIBRA en Argentina ha descubierto un documento de contrato por el que se establece un pago de 5 millones de dólares a cambio del apoyo público del presidente argentino, Javier Milei, a dicha criptomoneda.

titulo: Goldman Sachs Warns Oil’s Biggest Shock Will Hurt Fuels Most
resumen: The largest oil market shock on record triggered by the war in the Middle East is set to have a greater impact on products such as jet fuel and diesel than on crude, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.
texto_completo: Goldman Sachs Warns Oil’s Biggest Shock Will Hurt Fuels Most. The largest oil market shock on record triggered by the war in the Middle East is set to have a greater impact on products such as jet fuel and diesel than on crude, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

titulo: Iran War Upheaval Jolts Shipping Fuel Suppliers in Singapore
resumen: A widening conflict in the Middle East has led to dramatic swings and surges in the price of fuel for ships, prompting distributors in Singapore, the world’s top bunkering hub, to cut back their purchases.
texto_completo: Iran War Upheaval Jolts Shipping Fuel Suppliers in Singapore. A widening conflict in the Middle East has led to dramatic swings and surges in the price of fuel for ships, prompting distributors in Singapore, the world’s top bunkering hub, to cut back their purchases.

titulo: Iran’s Political Prisoners Are in the Firing Line
resumen: Thousands of detainees are in danger from U.S. and Israeli strikes and Tehran’s vengeance.

titulo: Attempts to open Strait of Hormuz by force would be ‘almost suicidal’
resumen: Andreas Krieg says that US plans to deploy 2,500 marines to the Gulf is unlikely to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
texto_completo: Attempts to open Strait of Hormuz by force would be ‘almost suicidal’. Andreas Krieg says that US plans to deploy 2,500 marines to the Gulf is unlikely to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

titulo: Trump claims strikes on Iran prevented nuclear war
resumen: Donald Trump claimed he ordered strikes on Iran to prevent a nuclear conflict that would have turned into World War III.
texto_completo: Trump claims strikes on Iran prevented nuclear war. Donald Trump claimed he ordered strikes on Iran to prevent a nuclear conflict that would have turned into World War III.

titulo: Iran war shows urgency of Hong Kong’s green shipping transition
resumen:
The war in Iran, culminating in the de facto closure of the Strait of Hormuz, has again exposed the world’s energy and maritime sector to acute vulnerabilities. The spike in oil prices and surging freight rates may grab headlines, but beneath these shocks lie fundamental questions about Asia’s – and Hong Kong’s – energy security, the resilience of shipping risk management and the urgent need to transform our maritime industry for a greener future.
The Strait of Hormuz is not just a geopolitical...
texto_completo:
Iran war shows urgency of Hong Kong’s green shipping transition. The war in Iran, culminating in the de facto closure of the Strait of Hormuz, has again exposed the world’s energy and maritime sector to acute vulnerabilities. The spike in oil prices and surging freight rates may grab headlines, but beneath these shocks lie fundamental questions about Asia’s – and Hong Kong’s – energy security, the resilience of shipping risk management and the urgent need to transform our maritime industry for a greener future.
The Strait of Hormuz is not just a geopolitical...

titulo: Papers please: China raises pressure on Panama amid canal row with ship inspection wave
resumen:
Beijing has increased its inspections on Panama-flagged vessels entering Chinese ports, a source from the shipping industry said, an action intended to raise the Latin American country’s stress level after its courts voided the operating rights of Hong Kong-based conglomerate CK Hutchison in the Panama Canal.
Port state control (PSC) – the inspection regime countries may deploy to verify the compliance of foreign ships with various international standards – was being used as a form of leverage...
texto_completo:
Papers please: China raises pressure on Panama amid canal row with ship inspection wave. Beijing has increased its inspections on Panama-flagged vessels entering Chinese ports, a source from the shipping industry said, an action intended to raise the Latin American country’s stress level after its courts voided the operating rights of Hong Kong-based conglomerate CK Hutchison in the Panama Canal.
Port state control (PSC) – the inspection regime countries may deploy to verify the compliance of foreign ships with various international standards – was being used as a form of leverage...

titulo: Trump está "sorprendido" por el rechazo de sus aliados a enviar buques al estrecho de Ormuz
resumen: El mandatario indicó que un par de naciones no especificadas se habían ofrecido a ayudar a Washington, pero subrayó que hay algunos países que lo "decepcionaron enormemente".
texto_completo: Trump está "sorprendido" por el rechazo de sus aliados a enviar buques al estrecho de Ormuz. El mandatario indicó que un par de naciones no especificadas se habían ofrecido a ayudar a Washington, pero subrayó que hay algunos países que lo "decepcionaron enormemente".

titulo: Muere joven que esperó por meses un medicamento que nunca le entregó el sistema de salud colombiano
resumen: La entrega estaba a cargo de una Entidad Promotora de Salud (EPS) llamada Nueva EPS, una de las empresas mixtas que presta servicios sanitarios en el país suramericano.
